access_token.description: Shutterstock OAuth access token, sent as a Bearer token.

page_size.description: Records requested per page (legacy default 100, max 500).

query.description: Optional search query filter passed through to every search stream.

sort.description: Optional sort order filter passed through to every search stream.

orientation.description: Optional orientation filter passed through to every search stream.

category.description: Optional category filter passed through to every search stream.
